title: Josh White (racing driver)
description: American stock car driver and Marine (born 1991)
extract:
Joshua White (born May 7, 1991) is an American professional stock car racing driver who last competed part-time in the ARCA Menards Series and ARCA Menards Series East, driving the No. 03/86 Ford for Clubb Racing Inc. He has also competed in the NASCAR Camping World Truck Series in the past. 
White is a former lance corporal in the United States Marine Corps Reserve and is believed to be the second U.S. Marine to compete in a NASCAR national series event.
